description:
A wind project developer in Wyoming needs to quantify the energy loss due to an environmental curtailment rule protecting migratory bats. Using Python and PySAM, model a wind farm using the 'Wind Power Single Owner' configuration and the Wyoming wind dataset located at /opt/SAM/2023.12.15/wind_resource/wyoming_wind_resource_dataset.csv.

Calculate the baseline annual energy and the curtailed annual energy by applying a rule where generation is reduced to zero if the month is August, September, or October; the hour of the day is between 20:00 and 05:00 inclusive; and the wind speed is strictly less than 6.0 m/s. Assume the time series data begins on January 1st at 00:00.

Save the analysis results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/bat_curtailment_analysis.json using the following keys:
- baseline_energy_kwh
- curtailed_energy_kwh
- energy_penalty_kwh
- curtailed_hours_count
